data.name: Mickey Mouse

abilities.name: Get a Clue
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text:
Wherever the seaweed had come from, Mickey was
sure of one thing: something fishy was going on.

data.name: HeiHei

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text:
"Sometimes, our strengths lie beneath the surface.
Far beneath, in some cases...."
—Moana

data.name: Yzma

abilities.name: You're Excused
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

data.flavor_text: "When I want your opinion, I will give it to you!"

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: All For One
abilities.text: Your other Musketeer characters get +1 {Strength}.

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: And Two For Tea!
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may remove up to 2 damage from each of your Musketeer characters.

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: Stay Alert!
abilities.text: During your turn, your Musketeer characters gain Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.name: Cinderella

abilities.name: Have Courage
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

data.flavor_text:
She's always had the heart of a champion—now
she'll have the skills, too.

data.name: Bucky

abilities.name: Squeak
abilities.text: Whenever you play a Floodborn character, if you used Shift to play them, each opponent chooses and discards a card.

data.flavor_text:
"There's a lot of nuance to squirrel."
—Kronk

keywords.name: Shift 2
keywords.text: (You may pay 2 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Minnie Mouse.)

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: Undersea Adventure
abilities.text: Whenever you play a second action in a turn, this character gets +2 {Lore} this turn.

data.name: Robin Hood

abilities.name: Skirmish
abilities.text: {Exert} — Deal 1 damage to chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
"Capable? You don't know the half of it."
—Little John

data.name: Gaston

keywords.name: Reckless
keywords.text: (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)

data.flavor_text: It's not arrogance when you really are the best.

data.name: Mickey Mouse
data.flavor_text: As long as he's around, newcomers to the Great Illuminary will always get a warm welcome.

data.name: Kit Cloudkicker

abilities.name: Skysurfing
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may return chosen opposing character with 2 {Strength} or less to their player's hand.

data.flavor_text:
"It's been fun, guys, but I got to be going.
Yahoooo!"

abilities.name: Look Alive, You Swabs!
abilities.text: Characters gain Rush while here. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

abilities.name: All Hands On Deck!
abilities.text: Your Pirate characters may move here for free.

data.name: How Far I'll Go
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.name: John Silver

abilities.name: Chart Your Own Course
abilities.text: For each location you have in play, this character gains Resist +1 and gets +1 {Lore}. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text: "I was never much good at games. Always hated to lose."

keywords.name: Shift 4
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Stitch.)

abilities.name: Adoring Fans
abilities.text: Whenever you play a character with cost 2 or less, you may exert them to draw a card.

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Rapunzel.)

abilities.name: Let Your Power Shine
abilities.text: Whenever you remove 1 or more damage from one of your characters, you may draw a card.

data.name: Pinocchio

abilities.name: Telling Lies
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may exert chosen opposing character.

data.flavor_text:
"A lie keeps growing and growing until it's as plain
as the nose on your face."
—Blue Fairy

data.name: Four Dozen Eggs
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Your characters gain Resist +2 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: Strike Up the Music
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character gains Support this turn.

abilities.name: Slippery Halls
abilities.text: Whenever a character is banished in a challenge while here, you may return them to your hand.

abilities.name: Seat of Power
abilities.text: Characters named Ursula get +1 {Lore} while here.

data.name: Hidden Inkcaster

abilities.name: Fresh Ink
abilities.text: When you play this item, draw a card.

abilities.name: Unexpected Treasure
abilities.text: All cards in your hand count as having ◉.

data.flavor_text:
"It looks like it's been here forever."
—Flounder

data.name: Mulan

abilities.name: Time to Shine
abilities.text: Whenever you play an action, this character gets +2 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
Ursula's messengers fled, leaving behind tendrils
of dark ink.

keywords.name: Shift 5
keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Ursula.)

abilities.name: Now I Am the Ruler!
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, exert chosen character.

abilities.name: You'll Listen to Me!
abilities.text: Other characters can't exert to sing songs.

data.name: Scrooge McDuck

abilities.name: Treasure Finder
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you pay 1 {Ink} less for the next item you play this turn.

data.flavor_text:
A strange new world is the perfect place to make a
strange new fortune!

data.name: Flotsam & Jetsam

keywords.name: Shift: Discard 2 cards
keywords.text: (You may discard 2 cards to play this on top of one of your characters named Flotsam or Jetsam.)

rules: This character counts as being named both Flotsam and Jetsam.

data.name: Snow White

abilities.name: How Do You Do?
abilities.text: You pay 1 Ink less to play Seven Dwarfs characters.

data.flavor_text: "Nothing says ‘hello' better than a fresh-baked pie."
